title: Product Portfolio: ZOLLERN Steel Profiles Division

sections.title: Capability Platform Overview
sections.content:
ZOLLERN Steel Profiles is a **capability platform**, not a fixed-product manufacturer. The division produces custom-geometry precision steel profiles configured to customer specifications. The "product" is the manufacturing capability envelope itself.

| Parameter | Cold Drawing | Cold Rolling | Hot Rolling | Unit |
|-----------|-------------|--------------|-------------|------|
| Cross-section range | 5 - 2,500 | 10 - 1,200 | 100 - 7,650 | mm2 |
| Dimensional tolerance | +/- 0.02 | +/- 0.05 | +/- 0.5 | mm |
| Surface roughness (Ra) | 0.4 - 1.6 | 0.8 - 3.2 | 1.6 - 6.3 | um |
| Max bar length | 6 | 6 | 12 | m |
| Weight per meter | 0.04 - 20 | 0.08 - 9.5 | 0.8 - 60 | kg/m |
| Min economic batch | ~100 | ~200 | ~500 | kg |
| Custom tooling lead time | 6 - 12 | 8 - 14 | 10 - 16 | weeks |

sections.title: Profile Type Families
sections.content:
| Profile Family | Geometry | Primary Process | Typical Application | Annual Volume (est.) |
|---------------|----------|-----------------|--------------------|--------------------|
| Round bars | Circular, precision | Cold drawing | Hydraulic cylinders, shafts | ~3,500 t |
| Square / Hex bars | Regular polygon | Cold drawing | General machining stock | ~2,000 t |
| Flat profiles | Rectangular, strip | Cold rolling | Linear guides, springs | ~1,800 t |
| T-profiles | T-shaped, asymmetric | Hot rolling + cold finishing | Elevator guide rails, structural | ~1,200 t |
| Custom symmetric | Mirror-symmetric custom | Cold drawing | Automotive, firearms | ~2,500 t |
| Custom asymmetric | Fully custom cross-section | Hot rolling + cold drawing | Door systems, special machinery | ~800 t |

Total division throughput estimated at ~12,000 t/year against installed capacity of ~18,000-20,000 t/year (30-40% idle). [SRC: web_search]

sections.title: Secondary Processing Capabilities
sections.content:
| Process | Capability | Equipment | Value Add |
|---------|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| Induction hardening | Surface hardness to 64 HRC, depth 0.5-5mm | Multi-frequency induction line | Wear resistance for guide rails, linear guides |
| CNC cutting | Precision cut to length +/- 0.1mm | Automated CNC saws | Eliminates customer sawing waste |
| Straightening | Straightness to 0.5mm/m | Roller straightening machines | Critical for guide rail applications |
| Heat treatment | Normalizing, Q&T, case hardening | Continuous furnace, batch furnace | Mechanical property optimization |
| Grinding | Surface finish to Ra 0.4 | Centerless + profile grinding | Bearing surfaces, sealing surfaces |
| Drilling / milling | CNC secondary machining | 5-axis CNC centers | Near-finished part delivery |

sections.title: Material Grades
sections.content:
| Grade Family | Representative Grades | Carbon (%) | Application Domain |
|-------------|----------------------|-----------|-------------------|
| Carbon structural | S235, S355, C45 | 0.17 - 0.50 | General structural, automotive |
| Carbon hardening | C60, C67, C75 | 0.57 - 0.80 | Springs, wear parts |
| Alloy structural | 42CrMo4, 34CrNiMo6 | 0.30 - 0.38 | High-strength shafts, gears |
| Case hardening | 16MnCr5, 20MnCr5 | 0.14 - 0.22 | Gears, pins, bushings |
| Bearing steel | 100Cr6 | 0.95 - 1.05 | Bearing races, rollers |
| Tool steel | X210Cr12, 90MnCrV8 | 0.85 - 2.10 | Cutting tools, dies |
| Stainless (limited) | 1.4301, 1.4404 | < 0.08 | Medical, food processing |

sections.title: Current Market Breakdown (estimated)
sections.content:
| Market Segment | Revenue Share | Volume Share | Trend | Margin |
|---------------|--------------|-------------|-------|--------|
| Automotive components | 25% | 28% | Declining | Low |
| General mechanical engineering | 20% | 22% | Declining | Medium |
| Elevator guide rails | 12% | 10% | Stable | Medium-High |
| Linear motion / guides | 10% | 8% | Growing | High |
| Hydraulic cylinders | 8% | 10% | Stable | Medium |
| Firearms components | 7% | 5% | Stable | High |
| Railway / rail vehicles | 5% | 7% | Growing | Medium |
| Construction machinery | 5% | 5% | Stable | Low |
| Other / project business | 8% | 5% | Mixed | Variable |
